snippet.title: Captain America: Brave New World | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Anthony Mackie and Harrison Ford star in Marvel Studios’ Captain America: Brave New World. Watch the brand-new trailer and experience it only in theaters February 14.

► Watch Marvel on Disney+: https://bit.ly/2XyBSIW
► Subscribe to Marvel on YouTube: http://bit.ly/WeO3YJ

Follow Marvel on Twitter: ‪https://twitter.com/marvel
